metadata.description: EvalHub agent skills for Claude Code

plugins.name: evalhub
plugins.description: Evaluate AI/ML models, run benchmarks, manage evaluation jobs, and follow EDD workflows

plugins.name: golang-cve-update
plugins.description: Scan Go repositories for vulnerabilities, determine minimum fixed Go version, and update version pins in go.mod, container files, and CI only when a matching tag exists on registry.access.redhat.com/ubi9/go-toolset
